narration: Beneath our feet lies a hidden network, connecting life in unimaginable ways.

narration: Mycelium, the vast network of fungal threads, links trees and soil in a dance of survival.
visual_description: Context visual: Mycelium, the vast network of fungal threads, links trees and soil in a dance of survival.
ai_image_prompt: Context visual: Mycelium, the vast network of fungal threads, links trees and soil in a dance of survival.

narration: This mycorrhizal network allows trees to share nutrients and even warn each other of danger.

narration: But scientists debate the extent of this communication. It’s not all clear-cut.

narration: What’s undeniable is that mycelium supports ecosystems, playing a pivotal role in biodiversity.
